text: "Hello?" "Good afternoon, this is Jacob. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Colorado State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet?" "Really?" "Well, I really want to help you get the shakin' care of as the benefits are time-sensitive. So you do have Medicare Part A and B, right?" "No, I don't." "Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day." "Well, don't call no more."
